name: Harris County Housing & Community Development
description_short: Harris County Housing & Community Development is a credit repair provider based in Houston, Texas. Rated 2.9/5 with 55 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Harris County Housing & Community Development is a credit repair provider serving clients in Houston, Texas. Carrying a 2.9/5.0 Google rating from 55 reviews, Harris County Housing & Community Development has an limited reputation among consumers in the Houston area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a local government office, Harris County Housing & Community Development provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Houston, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Harris County Housing & Community Development operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Houston, Texas area who are considering Harris County Housing & Community Development should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
